notes.validationApproach: Unit tests provide primary coverage for all runtime-scale assertions. All 197 tests pass including specific tests for VAL-ROUTE-015 (concurrency cap), VAL-ROUTE-016 (failure isolation), VAL-OBS-002 (budget diagnostics), VAL-CROSS-001 (flag isolation), VAL-CROSS-003 (async lineage). Curl-based API validation confirmed async ack structure and terminal status format.
notes.curlTestingLimitation: Discovery worker has no target companies configured (companies: [] in worker-config.json), preventing full end-to-end curl testing of runtime-scale behaviors that require actual company processing. Unit tests mock this behavior and provide deterministic validation.
notes.asyncLineageVerified: Manual curl verification confirmed accepted_async ack includes runId, statusPath, pollAfterMs and terminal status shows consistent runId lineage through lifecycle transitions.
